offer: For property managers processing 5–15 rental units, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate rent collection tracking and delinquency reporting instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking rent payments and managing delinquency reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property managers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try monthly delinquency report and email notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
